title: Sales Manager (Whitebook GAM)
description:
THE ROLE

You will be driving the demand for AMD-based products across Asia Pacific, India, and Japan (APIJ) for our Taiwan and China based ODM partners (Whitebooks – WB). You will define and execute the APJ sales strategy for nominated accounts, ensuring revenue and market share objectives are achieved.

You will require a high level of integrity and trust, as well as the ability to manage multiple projects while working cross-functionally with AMD’s in-country sales and marketing teams, the Worldwide Emerging Accounts team, and AMD Business Units. Success will be measured by meeting or exceeding all revenue and unit goals.


THE PERSON

You will demonstrate:

  • A passion for building strong, lasting relationships with internal and external stakeholders.
  • A competitive drive to succeed, balanced with sound business judgment.
  • A proven track record of delivering results and exceeding sales targets.
  • High levels of accountability, confidence, maturity, and integrity.
  • Excellent communication skills and the ability to engage effectively across all customer touchpoints.
  • Honesty and trustworthiness in all interactions.
  • Strong listening skills and the ability to translate customer needs into actionable plans.
  • Strategic vision and long-term planning capabilities.
  • International business experience and cultural adaptability across diverse geographies.
  • Comfort presenting product information and sales strategies to large audiences (e.g., partner events).
  • Willingness to travel up to 25% to APJ regions.


KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Partner with AMD APJ Consumer and Commercial Sales teams to align products, positioning, account engagement strategies and pipeline/forecasting cadence.
  • Leverage market data and country-level feedback to identify new WB opportunities and connect ODMs with in-country partners to develop new business.
  • Define and implement sales-out strategies and account plans to grow AMD’s revenue and market share across APJ, in collaboration with Worldwide Emerging Accounts counterparts.
  • Build and strengthen relationships with product and business management teams within nominated WB accounts.
  • Drive strategic portfolio and go-to-market planning based on data-driven insights.
  • Influence regional assortments and global design-win decisions using regional market knowledge.
  • Manage forecasts and pipeline on a weekly, monthly, quarterly, and annual basis, providing executive-level reporting on program and market impact.
  • Develop business cases for growth initiatives and sales-out programs; design marketing and sales programs from the ground up.
  • Provide market intelligence and competitive insights to Sales leadership and Worldwide Emerging Accounts team.


PREFERRED EXPERIENCE

  • Extensive experience working with OEMs and ODMs (such as Emdoor,  Six United, ECS, Clevo and Uniwill) in the APJ region.
  • Skilled in matchmaking between ODMs, local OEM/brands (such as BYD, South Holding etc.), SIs (HANA, BMOR, GreatWall etc), reseller ecosystems
  • A solid background in CPU/GPU/component vendors and consumer/commercial sales, consistently delivering results and surpassing sales targets.
  • In-depth knowledge of the PC and/or semiconductor industry in Taiwan and China.
  • Proven success in sales roles for PC notebook products.
  • Confident presenting to large groups of partners or resellers.
  • Demonstrated ability to analyze data, trends, and market dynamics to create impactful plans.
  • Proficiency in Excel (pivot tables, charts) and PowerPoint


ACADEMIC CREDENTIALS:

  • Minimum undergraduate degree

postedCompany.description:
AMD (NYSE: AMD) is a semiconductor design innovator leading the next era of vivid digital experiences with its groundbreaking AMD Accelerated Processing Units (APUs) that power a wide range of computing devices. AMD’s server computing products are focused on driving industry-leading cloud computing and virtualization environments. AMD’s superior graphics technologies are found in a variety of solutions ranging from game consoles, PCs to supercomputers.

 

AMD, Singapore is the Singapore Product Development Center (SPDC) for AMD as well as its Asia Pacific regional headquarters for AMD Sales and Marketing.


Established in 1984, AMD Singapore is an engineering site leveraging the differentiated engineering expertise and unique eco-system for product bring-up and sample generation enabling timely product launches, higher test cost margins and the quality expectations of our customers.


AMD SPDC actively taps into the large talent pool from the region. Today its highly sophisticated and efficient engineering operations environments are equipped with high-end engineering laboratories that support New Product Bring-up, Customer Samples Generation, Device Analysis, Reliability Testing, Surface Mount Board Assembly Evaluations, Packaging Characterization, Platform Validation and Hardware Debug.


AMD SPDC strives to recruit and retain the best talent, making it not only a great place to work but also an integral part of the AMD family by continuing to contribute significantly to AMD’s success.
postedCompany.name: ADVANCED MICRO DEVICES (SINGAPORE) PTE LTD
